NAME

aspect_ratio.h - 📐 Aspect Ratio Calculation Functions

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void aspect_ratio (const ssize_t img_width, const ssize_t img_height, const ssize_t width, const ssize_t height, const bool stretch, ssize_t *out_width, ssize_t *out_height)
Calculate aspect ratio with terminal character correction. void aspect_ratio2 (const ssize_t img_width, const ssize_t img_height, const ssize_t target_width, const ssize_t target_height, ssize_t *out_width, ssize_t *out_height)
Simple aspect ratio calculation without terminal character correction. void calculate_fit_dimensions_pixel (int img_width, int img_height, int max_width, int max_height, int *out_width, int *out_height)
Calculate fit dimensions for pixel-based images.
